title: Week 4 Review
html:
Congratulations on completing week four! After finishing your lessons you should now know:

  • 19 new kanji
  • 12 new words in katakana
  • How to express actions from a starting point to a destination, the need for something (ほしいです), how to say something you would like to do, and how to express movement to and from a place
  • How to compare things, ask what is better than something else, use several adjectives together, ask detailed questions about an interval of time and use classifiers to express a period of time ( －ぷん,－じかん, etc.)
  • How to use 5 new grammar points:
    • Grammar focus on how to use adjectives and nouns in the past
    • Grammar focus on how to express quantity with verbs
    • Grammar focus on the particles から、まで、ぐらい
    • Grammar focus on using adjectives and nouns in the past negative form
    • Grammar focus on the particles に, なに, だれ, どこ＋
If you have any questions on what you have learned this week, don’t forget that you can always ask for more help in the student community!
